channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: F1 closer to approving expanded grid for General Motors entry initially started by Michael Andretti
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — With a restructuring at Andretti Global that pushed Michael Andretti into a smaller role, the chances of his organization landing a Formula 1 team have substantially increased.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rafael Nadal retired after the Davis Cup. It's a rare team event in tennis
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Rafael Nadal wanted to play his last match before retiring in Spain, representing Spain and wearing the red uniform used by Spain's Davis Cup squad.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: McLaren's Zak Brown talks mentality in tight race for F1 constructors' championship
item.description: McLaren Racing CEO Zak Brown is trying to keep things in perspective ahead of a crucial race weekend in Las Vegas while maintaining the constructors' lead.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nick Chubb plows through heavy snow for 2-yard TD, giving Browns 24-19 win over Steelers
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — With snow falling, Nick Chubb plowed forward. On a play that looked eerily similar to the one in Pittsburgh last year that threatened to end his career, Chubb kept his legs moving and pushed his way into the end zone for a touchdown he and his teammates won't forget.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Shohei Ohtani wins third MVP award, first in NL. Aaron Judge earns second AL honor in 3 seasons
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Shohei Ohtani keeps setting records, even after the season is over. The Los Angeles Dodgers star added his third Most Valuable Player award to his collection and first in the National League when he was chosen unanimously by the Baseball Writers' Association of America on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: College basketball player under federal investigation for allegedly fixing games: report
item.description: A former Temple men's basketball player is accused of point-shaving and fixing a game that had sketchy betting line activity before tipoff last year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Status of 49ers’ Brock Purdy grows grim ahead of Packers trip
item.description: Quarterback Brock Purdy's status for Sunday's game at Green Bay is dimming as he made only a cameo at Thursday's practice.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Aaron Judge, Shohei Ohtani named unanimous MVPs after historic seasons
item.description: The New York Yankees' Aaron Judge and Los Angeles Dodgers' Shohei Ohtani, the two biggest superstars in Major League Baseball, earned MVP Awards Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Penn State wins trademark case over retailer's use of vintage logos, images
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Penn State has won a closely watched trademark fight over an online retailer's use of its vintage sports logos and images. A Pennsylvania jury awarded Penn State $28,000 in damages on Wednesday over products made and sold by Vintage Brand and Sportswear Inc.
item.dc:creator: MARYCLAIRE DALE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No ball at Tropicana Field in 2026; new ballpark deal dies: Rays
item.description: The St. Petersburg City Council has voted to spend over $23 million to repair Tropicana Field after Hurricane Milton destroyed the roof on the home of the Tampa Bay Rays.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Colorado's 2-way star Travis Hunter eyes Big 12 title and more before 'for sure' entering NFL draft
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Travis Hunter made a pair of proclamations Thursday: He’s for sure entering the NFL draft after this season, but not until he sees Colorado all the way through the College Football Playoff — if the Buffaloes make it there.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: QB Daniel Jones disagrees with the Giants' decision to bench him and says he wants to play
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — With tears occasionally welling in his eyes, Daniel Jones disagreed on Thursday with the New York Giants' decision to bench him earlier this week and perhaps end his five-plus tenure as the team's quarterback.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James announces he's leaving social media
item.description: LeBron James is taking a break from social media, citing negativity online. The Lakers star posted a screengrab of a post from Rich Kleiman, Kevin Durant's longtime agent, to X, formerly Twitter.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, KTLA 5

item.title: 20 years later: A look back at the Malice at the Palace
item.description: (WXIN/WTTV) — It has now been 20 whole years since the most infamous night in Indiana Pacers franchise history: The Malice at the Palace. One of the worst brawls in U.S. sports history, the incident occurred on Nov.
item.dc:creator: Joe Schroeder, NewsNation

item.title: Alex Killorn helps the Ducks beat the Blackhawks 3-2 for their third straight win
item.description: Alex Killorn had a goal and an assist in the third period, and the Anaheim Ducks beat the Chicago Blackhawks 3-2 on Tuesday night for their season-high third straight win.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Morgan, San Juan, Beaver win state football titles
item.description: CEDAR CITY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In a battle of unbeatens, Morgan High proved to be the last team standing in the 3A high school football playoffs. The Trojans beat Richfield in a defensive battle Saturday night at Southern Utah University, 13-2.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former Detroit Lions player charged over Capitol riot
item.description: A former Detroit Lions linebacker was arrested and charged with allegedly assaulting law enforcement and other offenses over the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol riot, according to the Department of Justice (DOJ).
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5
